cannot_assert: CellChat model p-values and communication probabilities do not establish biological replication, physical binding, or causal signaling.
confirmed: Rows are filtered at CellChat p <= 0.05 and the top 30 are ranked by communication probability; fill maps probability and area maps -log10 p with a 1e-4 floor.
interpretable: Sender-receiver labels, ligand-receptor labels, probability scale, and p-value area legend are readable.
recommendation: Keep with the display-filter subtitle and exported full communication table.
visible: All 30 points, five unique interaction rows, axis labels, and both legends are visible without clipping.
